name: @leryk1981/mova-flat-runner
description: MCP server for governed AI workflows — invoice OCR, AML triage, credit review, and custom contracts with human approval gates and audit trails

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='dist/index.js';let c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!/usr/bin/env node'))fs.writeFileSync(p,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c);fs.chmodSync(p,0o755);"
scripts.test: npm run test:build && node --test dist-test/tests/unit/*.test.js dist-test/tests/negative/*.test.js
